name: The First National Bank And Trust Company Of Broken Arrow
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and digital banking services.
description_long:
First National Bank and Trust Company of Broken Arrow is a traditional community bank headquartered in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma. The institution is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit protection up to regulatory limits. The bank operates with a mission centered on putting people first, as reflected in their tagline "First People put People First!"

The bank offers comprehensive financial services across both personal and business segments. Personal banking includes checking accounts (including the high-yield GrowGetter Checking product), savings accounts, CDs, IRAs, debit cards, credit cards, personal loans, mortgages, and digital banking access including Zelle integration. Business clients can access business checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, digital banking, business debit cards, credit cards, business loans, and cash management services. The bank also provides resources including fee schedules, wire instructions, secure document upload, and mobile app access for both iOS and Android devices.

The bank distinguishes itself through local community presence, being located in the historic Rose District of Broken Arrow with active participation in community initiatives. Their GrowGetter Checking account specifically targets younger customers (ages 13-30) with a competitive 5.00% APY on balances up to $1,000. The bank emphasizes security awareness, explicitly warning customers about fraud call attempts and providing direct phone contact (918-251-5371) for verification.

As a traditional community bank, First National Bank and Trust Company of Broken Arrow serves customers seeking established banking relationships with local accountability. The institution is best suited for individuals and small to mid-size businesses in the Broken Arrow area seeking comprehensive banking services with personal service. Customers should verify current rates, fees, and product availability directly, as website content provides service descriptions but not detailed product terms. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts including GrowGetter Checking (5.00% APY up to $1,000)
Savings accounts and money market accounts
CDs (Certificates of Deposit) and IRA accounts
Business loans and cash management services
Debit cards and credit cards for both personal and business accounts
Digital banking and online account access
Mobile app for iOS and Android devices
Digital wallet integration for contactless payments
Wire transfers and check reordering services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
GrowGetter Checking offers competitive 5.00% APY on balances up to $1,000 for ages 13-30
Integrated Zelle digital payments available for fund transfers
Mobile app available for both iOS and Android with bill pay and fund transfer capabilities
Digital wallet integration for contactless payments via debit cards on smartphones and watches
Established community bank with local presence in historic Rose District and community involvement
Both personal and business banking solutions under one institution with dedicated resources
cons: Limited geographic footprint as a community bank (Broken Arrow-focused), not nationwide accessibility
Website does not display current interest rates, APYs, or fee schedules in accessible format
No information provided about credit card rewards programs, mortgage rate details, or loan APRs
Lacking transparency on minimum balance requirements, monthly fees, or product-specific terms
No indication of whether the bank serves customers outside Oklahoma or offers online-only account opening

contact.address: 121 S Main St, Broken Arrow, OK 74012

best_for: Young adults ages 13-30 seeking high-yield checking with the GrowGetter account
Broken Arrow and surrounding Oklahoma residents wanting local community banking relationships
Small to mid-size businesses needing comprehensive business banking and cash management services
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance and traditional bank stability over fintech alternatives
diagnosis: First National Bank and Trust Company of Broken Arrow is best for Broken Arrow-area residents and local businesses seeking comprehensive, FDIC-insured banking services with community accountability and personal service. The primary caveat is that as a traditional community bank with limited geographic presence, it may not serve customers outside Oklahoma, and critical product details (rates, fees, minimums) require direct contact with the bank rather than being readily available online.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 121 S Main St, Broken Arrow, OK 74012
